title: Trying AI agents, should I retire? (jk, too poor anyway :D )
author: Traditional_Ear5237
selftext: some new projects are popping up using agents and trading together, will be posting some results once they accumulate. Maybe even will do like a comparison table later on.

replies.author: Traditional_Ear5237
replies.body: sure, this result is from this one [https://yeagers.tech/](https://yeagers.tech/)  , also trying [coincidenceai.xyz](http://coincidenceai.xyz), but it seems like the ai there is only in the initial part and not in trading

comments.author: Majestic_Landscape_5
comments.body: You should check out this one as well. He was invited to compete in France with top 5 traders in the world. https://beta.obside.com/ai-trading-arena

replies.author: Traditional_Ear5237
replies.body: oh thats like the previous llm arena, have seen quite a lot of them. It seems like people like them
